name: Humalog Mix 25 Kwik Pen
about: Humalog Mix 25 Kwik Pen is a solid dosage form medicine that is originated in India. This medicine is designed to provide fast-acting insulin to adults who are suffering from diabetes. It is suitable for those who need a flexible insulin treatment plan. The dosage of this medicine should be taken as per the suggestion of a healthcare professional. Humalog Mix 25 Kwik Pen is designed to be used by patients who need both basal and prandial insulin. It works by controlling the glucose level in the blood and helps prevent the risk of complications associated with diabetes. The pen is easy to use, and the dosage can be adjusted as required.
